description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray or white, with large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern across the facade. The front features a covered entryway with a dark overhang supported by wooden posts, leading to a driveway and a single-car garage. Lush landscaping surrounds the house, including several mature trees and manicured grass areas enclosed by a low fence. The rear of the house includes a patio area and additional windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a covered entryway, surrounded by landscaped greenery and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a dark overhang, driveway, garage, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, side yard, and continuation of the fence and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, additional windows, and enclosed yard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible windows, side yard, and mature trees along the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a dark overhang, wooden posts, and a direct path from the driveway
